acceptance.evidence: Authorization binds the exact ordered artifact list, paths, types, hashes, validation lineage, chain id, and create-only permission.
Artifact-list drift, implicit creation permission, or unauthorized authority fields fail closed.
Any existing target fails closed during preflight before sibling artifacts are created.
All five governance, runtime, and test artifacts must be created and verified before EXECUTABLE_BUNDLE_VERIFIED.
Replay records executable bundle authorization, creation evidence, per-artifact verification, and bundle verification result.
The Marketing domain CLI path reaches EXECUTABLE_BUNDLE_AUTHORIZED, ARTIFACTS_CREATED, EXECUTABLE_BUNDLE_VERIFIED, REVIEW_COMPLETED, and TERMINATED.
The certified CLI acceptance created all five executable Marketing domain bundle artifacts in the repository.

implementation_boundary: The runtime and test files are deterministic executable placeholders, not real Marketing implementation logic.
